docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF STANLEY WILLIAMS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PRESTON CHEEK. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON HEARING SET FOR JUL-27-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PRESTON CHEEK IS GRANTED. THE COURT SHALL ISSUE A NEW JUDGMENT, FORTHWITH. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF STANLEY WILLIAMS & DEFENDANT PRESTON CHEEK. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT PRESTON CHEEK'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT ISSUED 7/8/16.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY SERVED OCT-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OFF-CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTIES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-30-2017 FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2017 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-25-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR STANLEY WILIAMS APPEARED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PRESTON CHEEK DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION RE: UPDATE OF DEFENDANTS ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2017 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-29-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. SISTER OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR WANTS TO OFFER JUDGMENT CREDITOR $2000.00 TO SETTLE THE CLAIM. JUDGMENT CREDITOR STANLEY WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PRESTON CHEEK IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY CHRISTINE BROWN, SISTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT PRESTON CHEEK, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PARTIES SETTLED FOR $2000. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT CREDITOR DIRECTLY WITH $2000 CASHIER'S CHECK. JUDGMENT CREDITOR SIGNED ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN COURT. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK, PRESTON

ORDER : JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S SISTER OFFERS AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR AGREES TO ACCEPT $2000 IN SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S SISTER PAYS $2000.00 BY CASHIER'S CHECK TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN OPEN COURT.
